title: Loot Table
description: Defines the loot that can be generated when an entity is killed, a chest is opened, fishing is performed, or other gameplay events occur. Loot tables consist of one or more pools, each containing entries with items or references to other loot tables.

pools.title: Pools
pools.description:
A list of loot pools. Each pool is rolled independently to select entries.

Properties:
• rolls (int) = 1
• bonus_rolls (int) = 0
• entries
• conditions
• tiers ({ initial_range, bonus_rolls, bonus_chance })

loot_loot_condition.title: Loot Condition
loot_loot_condition.description: Defines a condition that must be met for a loot table entry or function to apply.

looting_multiplier.title: Looting Multiplier
looting_multiplier.description: For 'random_chance_with_looting': additional chance per looting level.

value.title: Value
value.description: For 'has_mark_variant' or 'has_variant': the variant value to match.

default_chance.title: Default Chance
default_chance.description: For 'random_difficulty_chance': default probability if difficulty not matched.

entity.title: Entity Type
entity.description: For 'entity_properties': which entity to check ('this', 'attacker', or 'attacking_player').

properties.title: Properties
properties.description:
For 'entity_properties': the entity properties to match.

Properties:
• on_fire (boolean)
• on_ground (boolean)

defaultSnippets.label: Properties
defaultSnippets.description: For 'entity_properties': the entity properties to match.

match_tool.title: Match Tool
match_tool.description:
For 'match_tool': the tool item properties to match.

Properties:
• item (string)
• enchantments

defaultSnippets.label: Match Tool
defaultSnippets.description: For 'match_tool': the tool item properties to match.

loot_loot_function.title: Loot Function
loot_loot_function.description: Defines a function that modifies a loot table entry when selected.

count.title: Count
count.description:
For 'set_count' and 'looting_enchant': the count value or range.

Properties:
• min (int)
• max (int)

data.title: Data
data.description:
For 'set_data': the data value or range to set.

Properties:
• min (int)
• max (int)

defaultSnippets.label: Data
defaultSnippets.description: For 'set_data': the data value or range to set.

damage.title: Damage
damage.description:
For 'set_damage': the damage percentage or range (0.0-1.0).

Properties:
• min (float)
• max (float)

defaultSnippets.label: Damage
defaultSnippets.description: For 'set_damage': the damage percentage or range (0.0-1.0).

treasure.title: Treasure
treasure.description: For 'enchant_randomly': whether to include treasure enchantments.

levels.title: Levels
levels.description:
For 'enchant_with_levels': the enchantment level or range.

Properties:
• min (int)
• max (int)

defaultSnippets.label: Levels
defaultSnippets.description: For 'enchant_with_levels': the enchantment level or range.

conditions.title: Conditions
conditions.description:
Conditions that must be met for this function to apply.

Properties:
• condition (string)
• chance (float)
• looting_multiplier (float)
• value (int)
• default_chance (float)
• peaceful (float)
• easy (float)
• normal (float)
• ... and 4 more properties

loot_loot_pool.title: Loot Pool
loot_loot_pool.description: Defines a pool of loot entries that can be rolled one or more times.

rolls.title: Rolls
rolls.description: Number of times to roll this pool. Can be a fixed number or a range object with min/max.

bonus_rolls.title: Bonus Rolls
bonus_rolls.description: Additional rolls added based on luck attribute. Can be fixed or range.

entries.title: Entries
entries.description:
Array of possible entries to select from when rolling this pool.

Properties:
• type (string)
• name (string)
• weight (int) = 1
• functions
• conditions
• pools

conditions.title: Conditions
conditions.description:
Array of conditions that must be met for this pool to be rolled.

Properties:
• condition (string)
• chance (float)
• looting_multiplier (float)
• value (int)
• default_chance (float)
• peaceful (float)
• easy (float)
• normal (float)
• ... and 4 more properties

tiers.title: Tiers
tiers.description:
Tiered entry selection configuration.

Properties:
• initial_range (int)
• bonus_rolls (int)
• bonus_chance (float)

loot_loot_entry.title: Loot Table Entry
loot_loot_entry.description: Defines an entry in a loot table pool that can be selected when the pool rolls.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of entry. Valid values: 'item' (drops an item), 'loot_table' (references another loot table), 'empty' (drops nothing).

name.title: Name
name.description: The item identifier (for type 'item') or loot table path (for type 'loot_table').

weight.title: Weight
weight.description: The relative weight of this entry being selected. Higher weights are more likely. Default is 1.

functions.title: Functions
functions.description:
Array of functions to apply to the item when selected.

Properties:
• function (string)
• count ({ min, max })
• data ({ min, max })
• damage ({ min, max })
• treasure (boolean)
• levels ({ min, max })
• id (string)
• destination (string)
• ... and 1 more properties

conditions.title: Conditions
conditions.description:
Array of conditions that must be met for this entry to be considered.

Properties:
• condition (string)
• chance (float)
• looting_multiplier (float)
• value (int)
• default_chance (float)
• peaceful (float)
• easy (float)
• normal (float)
• ... and 4 more properties

pools.title: Pools
pools.description:
Nested pools for type 'loot_table'. Allows inline loot table definition.

Properties:
• rolls (int) = 1
• bonus_rolls (int) = 0
• entries
• conditions
• tiers ({ initial_range, bonus_rolls, bonus_chance })
